title: Chain 1/8: Lost on the Street
scene: 你在街上迷路了，向路人问路。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问百老汇大街怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to Broadway?

turns.cn: 往前直走两个路口，然后右转。
turns.en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn right.
How long does it take on foot?
About ten minutes.
Is there a subway station nearby?

turns.cn: 有，百老汇大街那头就有一个。
turns.en: Yes, there's one at the end of Broadway.
Thank you so much!

title: Chain 2/8: Which Way to Turn
scene: 你在十字路口，不确定该往哪边走。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 不好意思，中央车站是在这边吗？
turns.en: Sorry, is Grand Central Station this way?

turns.cn: 不是，你得往回走，在第二个红绿灯左转。
turns.en: No, you need to go back and turn left at the second light.
The road on the left?

turns.cn: 对，一直走到底就能看到。
turns.en: Yes, keep going until you see it.
Is it far? I'm in a hurry.

turns.cn: 走路十五分钟，打车五分钟。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes walking, five by taxi.

title: Chain 3/8: Find the Subway
scene: 你想坐地铁，问地铁站入口在哪。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Where's the nearest subway entrance?

turns.cn: 前面那个绿色亭子就是。
turns.en: That green kiosk up ahead.
Which line goes to Times Square?

turns.cn: 下去看指示牌，N 线或 R 线。
turns.en: Check the signs downstairs. N or R train.
Thanks!

title: Chain 4/8: Inside a Building
scene: 你在一栋办公大楼里找会议室。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 你好，请问 1208 会议室在哪？
turns.en: Hi, where is conference room 1208?
Twelfth floor. Turn right out of the elevator.
Do I need to sign in as a visitor?

turns.cn: 请在这本子上写名字和公司。
turns.en: Please write your name and company in this book.
Which floor are the restrooms on?
On every floor, next to the elevators.

title: Chain 5/8: Map Not Working
scene: 手机导航不准，你向街边店员求助。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 不好意思，手机导航把我搞糊涂了，博物馆在哪边？
turns.en: Sorry, my phone GPS is confused. Which way is the museum?

turns.cn: 出店左转，过两座桥就到了。
turns.en: Left out of the store, past two bridges.
The Met Museum?
Yes, the one with the big steps.
How long on foot?
About twelve or thirteen minutes.

title: Chain 6/8: Which Bus Line
scene: 你在公交站，不确定该坐哪辆车。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 去中央公园该坐哪路公交？
turns.en: Which bus goes to Central Park?
The M10 heading north. Wait at this stop.
How often does it come?
About every eight to ten minutes.
Do I need exact change?
Just tap your card. Two seventy-five.

title: Chain 7/8: Taxi Going Wrong Way
scene: 出租车好像走反了，你礼貌提醒司机。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 不好意思，应该是在第五大道往南，不是往北。
turns.en: Sorry, it should be Fifth Avenue south, not north.
Oh, I'll loop around and turn up front.
No worries. I'm not in a rush anymore.
Here we are. Thirty-Fourth Street entrance.
Thank you.

title: Chain 8/8: Arrive at Destination
scene: 你终于到了面试大楼，向保安确认楼层。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Hello. Who are you here to see?

turns.cn: 两点面试，ABC 科技，十二楼。
turns.en: Interview at two PM, ABC Tech, twelfth floor.

turns.cn: 请登记，电梯需要刷卡，我帮您刷。
turns.en: Please sign in. The elevator needs a badge. I'll swipe you up.
Thank you. Glad I finally made it.
Twelfth floor, turn left. Good luck.
